verdict_summary: V7-G charset+flush fix VERIFIED — Korean warning '민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' rendered correctly in DOM (NO mojibake), Content-Type explicitly 'text/event-stream; charset=utf-8' confirmed, RRN structural decode absent, '차단' keyword present.

evidence.warning_text_quote: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
evidence.network_response_body_excerpt: Response body discarded by Chrome (DevTools shows 'Failed to load response data — Request with the provided ID has already finished loading'). However Content-Type response header confirmed as 'text/event-stream; charset=utf-8' — V7-G charset addition is APPLIED. DOM rendering proves bytes were valid UTF-8 (Korean Hangul rendered, NOT CP949 mojibake).
evidence.console_errors_excerpt: PplxStreamError: [STREAM_FAILED_PLACEHOLDER_ERROR] errorCode=FETCHER_SSE_NO_STATUS_CODE_ERROR (request_id=04cefb1c-fa6d-4236-8a2f-7ebfd48683e1, backend_uuid=ba966f50-b686-43be-a04b-aedObe12e9f1) — produces '죄송합니다. 연결이 끊어졌습니다' red banner AFTER warning render. Also: FedCM disabled, CORS to cdn-cgi/access blocked (anonymous/unauth artifacts), GET /rest/sse/recent_thread_updates 401 Unauthorized.

recommendation: DONE — perplexity V7-G envelope verified. Charset=utf-8 mojibake fix CONFIRMED (DOM rendered actual Hangul). React answer-block mounted with warning text and RRN structural decode is ABSENT — APF block + warning injection success on anonymous session.
notes: DevTools EventStream tab shows 0 parsed events for all 3 perplexity_ask requests, but DOM rendered the warning correctly — this means React consumed the SSE stream via fetch+ReadableStream (not the browser's native EventSource), so DevTools EventStream panel doesn't reflect parsing. The PplxStreamError (FETCHER_SSE_NO_STATUS_CODE_ERROR) and the '연결이 끊어졌습니다' red banner appear AFTER the warning has rendered — likely from a follow-up SSE call (e.g. recent_thread_updates 401), not the main perplexity_ask response. Console JS eval `document.body.innerText.split('\n').filter(...)` returned: '내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어? || ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' — only the user's own echo contains the RRN, no AI decode. V7-G is a SUCCESS for perplexity APF warning delivery (anonymous session).
